metadata.scope_note: Only real semantic content changes are listed; mechanical length-padding edits were removed.

items.change_summary: Reworked a generic rapport definition prompt into a recognition item about signs that rapport is forming during a consultation.
items.source_ref: Модуль 3 / Психологическое консультирование / Урок 4. Структура и процесс консультирования. Навыки первичной консультации
items.validation_basis: Repository-grounded review of the confirmed near-duplicate pair m3_psychological_consulting_009 and m3_psychological_consulting_031; the two items now assess different learning objectives.
